reapack.name: reaper_libsndfilewrapper.ext
reapack.desc: libsndfile wrapper for REAPER (RF64, CAF, W64, AIFF, AU, PAF, SD2, VOC, RAW, AVR, HTK, IFF, MAT, MPC, PVF, SDS, SF, WVE, XI)

version.author: Matthias Kronlachner
version.changelog: - Distribute through ReaPack (raw per-platform binaries on GitHub releases) - Build against an older glibc baseline and statically link libstdc++ so the Linux build loads on older distributions (e.g. Debian 12 / MX 23)

metadata.description:
{\rtf1\ansi\deff0{\fonttbl{\f0 \fswiss Helvetica;}}{\colortbl;\red255\green0\blue0;} \widowctrl\hyphauto
\b\fs36 reaper_libsndfilewrapper\b0\fs22\par \par REAPER extension adding import (reading) and export (writing) for the audio formats handled by libsndfile - RF64, CAF, W64, AIFF, AU, PAF, SD2, VOC, RAW, AVR, HTK, IFF, MAT, MPC, PVF, SDS, SF, WVE, XI.\par \par Restart REAPER after installing or updating.\par }
